visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A cartoon avatar with a bald head and three distinct hairs appears against a yellow grid background, shouting with an exaggerated open mouth and expressive wide eyes. (2) The background shifts to a decorative red and gold pattern as multiple animated sticker boxes pop into the frame, showcasing various character expressions and humorous poses. (3) A second character with black hair and a red shirt enters from the side, interacting with a pudding cup while captions appear around him in a stylized font. (4) The video transitions into a fast-paced showcase of diverse sticker designs, including the main character as a bat, a baby angel, and a soldier in camouflage. (5) A cartoon cat with large shimmering eyes appears, followed by a screen filled with multiple identical cat avatars meowing. (6) The final phase features a green background with the LINE app logo and descriptive text detailing a New Year promotion, while the main character waves enthusiastically.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 注意. (2) [Subtitle]: 阿啾第一款有聲音的貼圖. [Slogan]: 上架啦. (3) [Subtitle]: 好吵喔. (4) [Subtitle]: 馬上來看看有什麼經典台詞吧. (5) [Variety]: 哈囉. [Variety]: 嘻嘻嘻嘻. (6) [Variety]: 笑死. [Variety]: 真假. (7) [Variety]: 不要瞎掰好嗎. [Variety]: 到底是在供三小. (8) [Variety]: 你好棒. [Variety]: 北七北七. (9) [Variety]: 吃飯囉. [Variety]: 叛逆. (10) [Variety]: 怕怕. [Variety]: 教召. (11) [Variety]: 肉肉. [Variety]: 爛泥. (12) [Variety]: 大便. (13) [Variety]: 是說謊的味道喔. (14) [Variety]: 呷崩啊. [Variety]: 葛腰喔. (15) [Variety]: 想要. [Variety]: 咪咪咪咪. (16) [Variety]: 掰掰. (17) [Logo]: LINE. [Subtitle]: 現在下載購買還可以參加新年活動唷！ [Subtitle]: 詳情請看內文資訊！

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A bald character with three hairs (A-Choo) and a black-haired young man, both in 2D animation style.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Vibrant and changing 2D backgrounds including yellow grids, traditional red/gold patterns, and solid green or grey colors.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A loud, sharp male voice shouts 'Attention!' repeatedly with high energy, followed by a poppy, high-tempo electronic beat. (2) The narrator speaks with a bright, enthusiastic tone, introducing the new sound sticker pack while cartoon 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects punctuate the dialogue. (3) A series of rapid-fire vocal snippets follow, featuring exaggerated laughs, dramatic cries, and humorous meme-related catchphrases with varying pitches. (4) Distinct sound effects for eating a burger and cat meowing are integrated into the rhythm of the speech. (5) The audio concludes with a clear, professional narration regarding a purchase promotion, maintaining a cheerful and inviting mood over the continuous upbeat background track.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To announce and demonstrate a new collection of animated LINE stickers with sound effects, using humor and high-energy visuals to drive downloads and engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of sticker product and call to action for downloading on LINE.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy animation typical of Taiwanese social media content creators, specifically promoting digital goods.
